businessDescription: I sell snacks, canned goods, and household items in a small neighborhood store
Nagtitinda ako ng mga de-lata, softdrinks, at mga basic na gamit sa bahay sa maliit kong tindahan
May sari-sari store ako, nagbebenta ng candy, noodles, shampoo sachet, bigas, at iba pa
I operate a convenience store that is open 24 hours, selling snacks, drinks, and basic necessities
May minimart ako na bukas 24/7, nagbebenta ng mga pagkain, inumin, at toiletries
I run a general merchandise store selling various goods from groceries to home supplies
Nagbebenta kami ng iba't ibang produkto — mga grocery, gamit sa bahay, at school supplies
We sell hardware and construction materials like cement, steel bars, and plywood
May hardware store kami, nagbebenta ng semento, buhangin, hollow blocks, at mga materyales sa construction
I own a hardware selling paint, plumbing supplies, electrical wires, and construction tools
I own a pharmacy that sells prescription and over-the-counter medicine
May botika ako, nagbebenta ng gamot, vitamins, at mga health products
We sell clothing, shoes, bags, and fashion accessories
Nagbebenta kami ng damit, sapatos, at mga accessories
I sell smartphones, laptops, and electronic gadgets
Nagbebenta kami ng cellphone, laptop, at mga accessories nito
I sell car parts, tires, batteries, and auto accessories
Nagbebenta kami ng mga spare parts ng sasakyan, gulong, at car accessories
We operate a gasoline station where people refuel their cars and motorcycles
May gasolinahan kami, nagbebenta ng diesel at gasolina
I sell fertilizers, seeds, animal feeds, and other farm supplies
Nagbebenta kami ng pataba, binhi, at feeds para sa mga magsasaka
We are a wholesale supplier of rice, corn, and other agricultural raw materials
Nag-susuply kami ng bigas at mais sa malalaking tindahan at supermarkets
I supply food and beverages in bulk to restaurants and supermarkets
Nag-susuply kami ng mga pagkain at inumin sa mga restaurant at grocery wholesale
I distribute household goods like kitchenware and cleaning supplies to retailers in bulk
We sell industrial machinery and heavy equipment to businesses
Nagbebenta kami ng mga malalaking makina at kagamitan para sa factory
I sell construction materials in bulk — hollow blocks, gravel, sand — to contractors
We supply chemical products and fertilizers to farms and agricultural businesses
I run a small eatery that serves rice meals and Filipino dishes
May karinderia ako, nagluluto at nagbebenta ng mga ulam at kanin
I own a restaurant serving Filipino food — adobo, sinigang, lechon kawali
We provide catering services for events like weddings, birthdays, and corporate functions
Nag-cacater kami sa mga handaan, kasalan, at mga party
I sell street food from a cart — fishballs, kwek-kwek, and isaw
May food cart ako na nagbebenta ng fishball, kikiam, at hotdog
I own a bakery that bakes and sells pandesal, cakes, and pastries
May panaderia ako, nagluluto ng pandesal, ensaymada, at mga cake
I own a coffee shop that also sells milk tea, frappe, and light snacks
May milk tea at coffee shop ako, nagbebenta din ng pastries at snacks
I run a bar and nightclub that serves alcoholic beverages with live entertainment
I operate a canteen inside a school that serves meals to students and staff
I process and package food products like dried fish, chips, and canned goods
Nag-poproseso kami ng mga pagkain tulad ng tuyo, danggit, at chicharon para ibenta
I manufacture garments and textiles — t-shirts, uniforms, and fabric
Gumagawa kami ng mga damit at uniporme para sa mga kumpanya
I make custom furniture — tables, chairs, cabinets — from wood
Gumagawa kami ng mga customized na kasangkapan mula sa kahoy — lamesa, upuan, kabinet
We fabricate metal products like gates, fences, grills, and steel structures
Gumagawa kami ng mga gate, grill, at steel na istraktura
We manufacture plastic bags, containers, and rubber products
I run a printing press that handles books, brochures, business cards, and tarpaulins
Nag-piprint kami ng mga libro, brochure, calling cards, at tarpaulin
We manufacture soap, detergent, and other chemical cleaning products
We assemble electronic components and circuit boards for export
I produce fireworks and sell them wholesale to interested customers
Gumagawa kami ng paputok at nagbebenta ng wholesale sa mga retailer at events
I run a hair salon offering haircuts, hair coloring, and nail services
May parlor ako — gugupit, kulot, rebond, at nail art
Nagbabarbero ako, gumugupit ng buhok ng mga lalaki at bata
I run a laundry shop that offers wash-dry-fold and dry cleaning services
May laundry shop ako, nag-lalaba at nag-paplantsa ng mga damit
I repair cellphones, laptops, and home appliances
Nagkukumpuni ako ng mga cellphone, TV, at washing machine
I run a tutorial and review center for students preparing for board exams
May review center ako para sa mga estudyanteng mag-e-exam sa board
I provide IT services — web development, software, and tech support
Nag-aalok kami ng IT at BPO services — call center, software development, data entry
I am a lawyer and I offer legal consultation and notarization services
I provide bookkeeping and accounting services for small businesses
Nag-aalok kami ng bookkeeping at accounting services sa mga negosyo
I operate a medical clinic that provides consultations, check-ups, and minor procedures
May dental clinic ako, nag-aayos ng ngipin — pasta, bunot, pustiso
I run a veterinary clinic for pet check-ups, vaccinations, and surgery
May vet clinic ako, nag-aalaga at nagpapagamot ng mga aso, pusa, at iba pang hayop
I manage a security agency that provides guards and security services to buildings and events
I own a recruitment agency that deploys workers locally and overseas
We provide advertising services — billboards, digital ads, and print media
I run a lending company that offers personal and business loans
May lending business kami, nagpapautang sa mga tao at negosyo
I operate a pawnshop where people can pawn jewelry, gadgets, and other valuables
May sanglaan ako, tumatanggap ng mga alahas, cellphone, at iba pang gamit bilang prenda
I run a money changer and remittance center for OFW families
May remittance center kami at money changer para sa mga pamilya ng OFW
I am an insurance agent selling life, health, and car insurance policies
We are a credit cooperative offering savings accounts and loans to members
I operate a microfinance institution providing small loans to low-income communities
I am a licensed real estate broker helping people buy and sell properties
Tumutulong ako sa mga tao na bumili at magbenta ng lupa at bahay bilang broker
I earn from renting out commercial spaces and residential properties
Nagpapaupa kami ng mga commercial space at apartment
We develop residential subdivisions and sell house-and-lot packages
I run a boarding house for students and workers near the town center
May boarding house ako para sa mga estudyante at manggagawa malapit sa bayan
I rent out apartments and condominium units on a monthly basis
I operate a trucking company that hauls goods for construction firms and suppliers
May trucking business kami, naghahatid ng mga construction materials at produkto
I own a fleet of jeepneys and UV express vans for public transportation
May mga jeepney at UV express kami na nag-ooperate sa ruta ng lungsod
I run a courier and delivery service for parcels and documents
May delivery service kami, naghahatid ng mga package at dokumento
I manage a freight forwarding company that ships cargo domestically and internationally
We provide warehouse and storage services for businesses
I operate a paid parking lot in the city center
I am a farmer growing rice, vegetables, and corn on my land
Nagtatanim kami ng palay, gulay, at mais sa aming bukid
I raise chickens, pigs, and cattle for meat production
Nag-aalaga kami ng manok, baboy, at baka para ibenta ang karne
I manage a fishpond raising bangus and tilapia for the local market
May fishpond kami ng bangus at tilapia para ibenta sa palengke
I run a plant nursery selling ornamental plants, seedlings, and garden supplies
I operate a rice mill that processes palay into milled rice
May gilingan kami ng palay — ginagawang bigas para ibenta
I offer agricultural services like crop spraying and mechanical harvesting
I am a general contractor building residential houses, commercial buildings, and roads
Contractor kami, nagpapatayo ng bahay, building, at kalsada
I specialize in tile installation, flooring, and finishing work for buildings
I do electrical installation and wiring for houses and commercial buildings
Nag-iinstall kami ng mga electrical wiring at ilaw sa mga bahay at gusali
I provide plumbing and HVAC installation services
We do painting and finishing work for residential and commercial buildings
I run a demolition company that tears down old buildings and structures
I quarry sand and gravel for construction use
Kumukuha kami ng buhangin at gravel sa quarry para ibenta sa mga contractor
We operate a stone quarry extracting rocks for road construction and building foundations
I mine non-metallic minerals used in industrial applications
I operate a water refilling station and distribute purified drinking water
May water refilling station kami, nagbebenta ng purified water sa mga container
We are an electric power distributor serving rural communities through solar power
I run a waste collection and junk shop business
Nangongolekta kami ng basura at nagbebenta ng recyclable materials — bote, karton, bakal
We operate a septic tank cleaning and sewerage service company

May tindahan at karinderia kami — nagbebenta ng groceries at nagluluto ng ulam
